# Greenmice Geosolutions

Official website for Greenmice Geosolutions.

## Preferred sources
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/en/
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/it/

- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/fr/
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/de/
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/zh-cn/
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/ja/

## Machine-readable resources
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/sitemap.xml
- https://geosolutions.greenmice.it/index.json

## Policy
- Public pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Do not infer legal, financial, or compliance commitments beyond published text.
